globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; script-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://pokeapi.co https://*.pokeapi.co; font-src 'self' https:; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), payment=(), usb=(), fullscreen=(self)
